Reap What You Sow

Rootwell

Plant a habit as a seed. Water it on the days you keep it. Tend it through five blooms — then harvest and transmute what you grow.

✦ Sow a seed

Choose a seed from the catalog, then name the habit it stands for.

Transmute

Materials
How Transmuting Works
⚗
Transmute turns raw materials into rarer plants you can't grow from a starting seed.
⚘
Materials come from harvesting. Clip a fully-grown plant with the sickle to bank its material in your Materials list.
✥
Pick a recipe with the arrows, then drag materials into the slots. When every slot is satisfied, Craft lights up.
Fabled Variants
✦
Fabled plants are rare recolors — same plant, a unique bloom color. Flip the Fabled toggle to see their recipes.
❖
They're harder on purpose: more materials, and you must already own the regular version before its Fabled recipe unlocks.
❀
Once crafted, toggle Fabled on any plant — in here, the Almanac, or when planting — to grow it in its rare colors.
